    Feedback
    Rate and Review on Google
    ⁦Google review summary⁩
    4.2(⁦1.1K⁩)

    Reviews are automatically processed to detect inappropriate content like fake reviews and spam. We may take down reviews that are flagged in order to comply with Google policies or legal obligations.

    Diners praise this restaurant's delicious food, which includes burgers, chicken, and pizza, and appreciate the variety of dining options such as outdoor seating with river views. The friendly service and relaxing atmosphere are also frequently highlighted by patrons.
    Some reviews mention the service can be inattentive.
    +34
    Summarized by AI. Learn more . Opens in new tab

    "Food and drinks were very good but the service and atmosphere were better."
    "A good place weather with the family (kids) or out for a night on the town."
